News Capstone

News Capstone — Documentation

Welcome to the documentation for the News Capstone Django application. This project implements a news platform with role-based access control (Readers, Editors, Journalists), an editorial approval workflow, subscriber email notifications, and a REST API.

  • Views
  • Forms
